case_title: HAYES VALLEY PROPERTIES vs. VICKERS, ALVIN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VICKERS, ALVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 419 IVY STREET, APT. #15, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,749.92 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,258.92, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. TO RECOVER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES FROM DEFT. ALVIN VICKERS AND UNKNOWN OCCUPANT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VICKERS, ALVIN

JUDGE CONWAY, JPOND, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:50 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. TRACEY MLODOZENIEC APPEARING FOR PLTF. DEFT ALVIN VICKERS IS NOT PRESENT. PLTF. CALLS KATHLEEN SLOCUM, SWORN AND EXAMINED PLTF'S EXH # 1 - RENTAL AGREEMENT ID/EV " " 2 - 3 DAY NOTICE " " PLTF. REST. COURT RULED, JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES, RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED, $1,749.92 RENTS/DAMAGES, $350 ATTYS FEES AND $159 COSTS. EXH. W/DRAWN. PLTF, PREPARED JUDGMENT.
